description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a broad chest and defined arms, wearing a sleeveless tank top emblazoned with bold text across the chest. He has a prominent handlebar mustache and a full beard, with long hair visible beneath a fitted bandana. The figure is dressed in fitted pants and sturdy shoes, and his hands are partially clenched, with one hand raised in a gesture. The facial expression is stern and focused, and the overall build suggests strength and athleticism. The clothing and accessories evoke a casual, athletic, or possibly wrestling-inspired style.
description: A muscular adult male with a handlebar mustache, bandana, sleeveless tank top, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes, posed in a strong, gesturing stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, handlebar mustache, tank top with text, muscular arms, and both hands, one raised in a gesture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm muscles, bandana, and the profile of the face and beard, with the hand gesture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the bandana, tank top, and pants, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, arm muscles, and the hand gesture, with the bandana and hair visible from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top and fitted pants with a headband accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with one hand gesturing
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with full beard and mustache
